_publications._publicationTitle: C6 Cell Injection into the Optic Nerve of Long-Evans Rats: A Short-Term Model of Optic Pathway Gliomas.

_contextSnippet: Luxol Fast Blue images of test tissues show significant difference suggesting demyelination after C6 injection
details: Demyelination observed in optic nerve tissue after C6 injection, with reduced Luxol Fast Blue staining indicating focal demyelination
